quotes.text: Science says we are made of starstuff. But seeing you, I believe some stars shine brighter than others.
quotes.author: Biotech Romance

quotes.text: In a world of complex variables, you are my only constant.
quotes.author: An Engineer's Thought

quotes.text: Reconnecting with you felt like finding a long-lost melody that fits perfectly back into the rhythm of my days.
quotes.author: A Simple Note

quotes.text: The best kind of people are the ones who come into your life and make you see the sun where you once saw clouds.
quotes.author: Appreciation
